steps.title: Find what they're known for
steps.content: The passage explicitly states: “New Caledonian crows are well known for creating hooks and spears from twigs.”

steps.title: Apply the statement to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly matches the passage's statement — they create tools out of twigs. The other three choices introduce information not in the passage: brain size and lifespan comparisons, or attribute the leaf-using behavior to the wrong bird. That matches choice C — C is correct.
